subject: sleepless obviously
body:
Jeffrey ,  Know you must have isuues tho i know little about  you lately.  
Why ?  U  OK ?
As for me  ~  being you asked , I am doing the  surgery on April 24th -  
checking in Apr. 20th .   ALso going  this Sat. April 7th  (WASHINGTON uNIV 
Medical)
- to St Louis  for  Monday review with Dr. Bridwell -  . Very scared but 
nearly happy -   hard to explain.   Distance from home and the travel my 
additional  fear now . It's not easy.
Also very - MOST - anxious of the return AFTER surgery which  will entail 
rods and screws,etc.
Maybe will be stronger than ever but hard to believe I won't hurt a  lot.
Will you please write back with advice or suggestion ? (this  is between you 
and me )
 Marcia Mae  (anyway , in some weird  way, miss hearing from you-brotherly  ?)



**************Create a Home Theater Like the Pros. Watch the video on AOL 
Home.      
(http://home.aol.com/diy/home-improvement-eric-stromer?video=15&ncid=aolhom00030000000001)
